summary: Iteration 43 - Partenaire (Partner) features Phase 1 testing. All 25 backend tests passed. All frontend features verified working: partenaire login via ProRegisterModal, dashboard with 3 tabs (Tableau de bord, Bénéficiaires, Freins périphériques), stats display, beneficiaire CRUD, frein management, skills management, historique tracking.

minor.issue: SIRET verification service temporarily unavailable (external API dependency)

seed_data_creation: 4 beneficiaires seeded for test@missionlocale.fr: Sophie Bernard, Pierre Leroy, Claire Moreau, Jean Martin with various statuses, freins and skills
context_for_next_testing_agent: Partenaire features fully functional. Login via /api/auth/login-pro with email as pseudo. Dashboard shows stats, beneficiaires list, freins summary. All CRUD operations work. Freins can be added with 8 categories (logement, sante, mobilite, garde_enfant, handicap, administratif, financier, autre) and resolved. Skills can be added to beneficiaires. Historique tracks all changes.

backend_api.POST_register_partenaire_success: PASSED - Creates partenaire with SIRET, structure_type, consent
backend_api.POST_login_pro_success: PASSED - Returns token for valid credentials
backend_api.GET_partenaires_profile: PASSED - Returns partner profile without password_hash
backend_api.PUT_partenaires_beneficiaires: PASSED - Updates status and adds to historique
backend_api.GET_partenaires_beneficiaires_detail: PASSED - Returns full beneficiaire with freins, skills, historique
backend_api.POST_beneficiaires_freins: PASSED - Adds frein with category, description, severity
backend_api.PUT_beneficiaires_freins_resolve: PASSED - Resolves frein with solution and resolved_at
backend_api.POST_beneficiaires_skills_multiple: PASSED - Multiple skills can be added
backend_api.seeded_beneficiaires_have_freins: PASSED - Freins exist on seeded data

frontend_ui.landing_page_loads: PASSED - Re'Actif Pro landing page loads
frontend_ui.pro_register_modal_tabs: PASSED - Créer un compte / Se connecter tabs work
frontend_ui.partenaire_registration_form: PASSED - All fields present (structure_name, structure_type, siret, email, password, referent info)
frontend_ui.siret_verification: PASSED - Verify button works (external API unavailable)
frontend_ui.consent_checkboxes: PASSED - CGU and Privacy checkboxes present
frontend_ui.dashboard_loads: PASSED - Espace Partenaires de Parcours displayed
frontend_ui.dashboard_stats_cards: PASSED - 6 metrics displayed (total, accompagnement, emploi, taux_insertion, freins_actifs, freins_resolus)
frontend_ui.tab_beneficiaires: PASSED - Beneficiaires list with status filters
frontend_ui.tab_freins_peripheriques: PASSED - Full freins view with resolve buttons
frontend_ui.beneficiaire_detail_view: PASSED - Shows name, sector, status, progress, skills, freins, historique
frontend_ui.create_beneficiaire_submit: PASSED - Creates and shows in list
frontend_ui.add_frein_submit: PASSED - Adds frein and shows in detail
frontend_ui.historique_display: PASSED - Shows creation, status changes, freins, skills

mocked_api.note: All APIs are real. SIRET verification depends on external API which may be unavailable.
